name: python3-ptyprocess
title: python3-ptyprocess
summary: Run a subprocess in a pseudo terminal from Python 3
description:
Run a subprocess in a pseudo terminal from Python 3
Launch a subprocess in a pseudo terminal (pty), and interact with both
the process and its pty.
.
Sometimes, piping stdin and stdout is not enough. There might be a password
prompt that doesn't read from stdin, output that changes when it's going to
a pipe rather than a terminal, or curses-style interfaces that rely on a
terminal. If you need to automate these things, running the process in a
pseudo terminal (pty) is the answer.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-ptyprocess because Run a subprocess in a pseudo terminal from Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-ptyprocess as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-ptyprocess with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-ptyprocess --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
